AxisDirection.description: BIDS-style i/j/k axis with optional sign reversal.
AxisDirection.title: AxisDirection

DatasetRef.description: The context (dataset and/or site) this spec describes.
DatasetRef.title: DatasetRef

Deferral.description: One paper→citation hand-off: the citation pointed at and the sentence saying so.
Deferral.title: Deferral

DeferredToCitation.description:
Paper explicitly refers methodological detail to another source.

Distinct from MISSING_FROM_PAPER (which means "we looked and found nothing"):
here the paper *names* a citation. Coupled like MISSING for inference
purposes — ``ProvenancedField`` rejects NOT_APPLICABLE on this arm.
DeferredToCitation.title: DeferredToCitation
